description: The tempered act of contributing one's gifts to the collective wellbeing with joy and purpose, not out of subservience. It is the understanding that individual and collective thriving are inseparable.
rationale: Composed from the established root 'lu' (deep flow) and a new proposed root 'he' (life-breath, vitality). The word's structure means 'a flow of one's vitality.' This frames service as a joyful, life-affirming offering of one's energy to the community, rather than a reluctant duty.
